title: Rich Uruguayan Veal Casserole
description: Savory veal casserole with a creamy coconut sauce, served in a mason jar, this dish is a nostalgic Uruguayan classic, egg-free and delicious.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the veal cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked veal mixture, coconut cream, salt, and black pepper, and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a mason jar and top with crushed crackers.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the crackers are golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
